title: Glycerol Stock
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"99l1q","text":"Method to create a long-term stable store of organisms. Especially useful if you want to store already transformed versions of organisms to aid in future experiments.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"cj7va","text":"Have a fresh inoculated liquid culture containing the organism you would like to store.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 600 uL of your inoculated liquid culture to a 2 mL screw top tube. undetermined
Add 200 uL autoclaved water to the screw top tube. undetermined
Add 200 uL glycerol to the screw top tube. undetermined This creates a 20% Glycerol Stock. Glycerol Contributed by users Catalog #G5516
Screw the top on the tube and mix by inversion several times so no layers are present in the mixture.
Place mixed screw top tube into a -80 C Freezer.
creator: Alan Cone
